description: Create a Slack channel via conversations.create. Returns Slack’s JSON (`ok`, `channel` on success). Channel names must follow Slack rules: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, max 80 characters ([Slack docs](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/conversations.create)).

name.description: Channel name to create (e.g. incident-2026-05-11). A leading # is stripped; input is normalized to lowercase. Use the `id` from the response with slack_post_message.

is_private.description: If true, create a private channel; if false or omitted, create a public channel.
